tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows impaired fasting glucose, dyslipidemia with elevated total cholesterol, LDL, triglycerides, and low HDL, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Renal function and electrolytes are within normal limits, and there is no evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend further evaluation and management of glucose and lipid abnormalities.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
